/work/tbsnetwork/.title: Nitro — a Profolio Template made for Framer
h2: a fictional philippine television project to see how real-world events play with western-level motion graphics and animations
wanna contact me for whatever reason? go ahead.
h3: since 2022, others have been doing their own fictional philippine television projects. using the knowledge of the tools i have, i know i can revolutionize the entire space.
p: i started tbs in mid-2025, never expecting it to blow up. thanks to the contacts i have in my fanmading space, it's somewhat huge. not comparable to the likes of FBS, but i'm getting there, and hopefully i will someday.

i've done things nobody could because of their limited time to upload or their device's capabilities (moon animator), and hopefully with enough experience i can take that 2 steps further. i'm grateful for my successes and hopefully the coming years will be better
